name: Palomar Holdings, Inc.
business: Palomar Holdings provides property and casualty insurance products to individuals and businesses through a multi-channel distribution model, leveraging underwriting expertise and data-driven analytics.
namedSuppliers: Ariel Re BDA, Ltd obo Lloyds Syndicate 1910

exposures.sentence: We are a specialty insurance company that provides property and casualty insurance products to individuals and businesses.
Our Earthquake products insure against home damage, contents, appurtenant structures, and temporary housing costs following an earthquake.
Our Crop insurance products are comprised primarily of multi-peril crop insurance offered in connection with the U.S. Department of Agriculture's Risk Management Agency.
Surety is a highly profitable, specialized market that we evaluated over several years; we acquired FIA and Gray Surety, enabling us to accelerate market entry.
We have introduced several new products including Crop, E&S Casualty, Surety and Environmental Liability.
Claims arising from unpredictable and severe catastrophe events, including those caused by global climate change, could reduce or eliminate our earnings and stockholders equity.
The growth and evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) may impact our business and operations.
Security breaches or cyber-attacks could expose us to liability and damage our reputation and business.

catalysts.event: Reorganization of product reporting: Surety and Credit premium reported as separate line, Fronting consolidated into existing lines
catalysts.sentence: We will reorganize the presentation of our product offerings in 2026 and report Surety and Credit premium as a separate line, reflecting changes in strategy and market focus following the Gray Surety acquisition.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of The Gray Casualty & Surety Company (renamed Palomar Casualty & Surety Company)
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we acquired The Gray Casualty & Surety Company ( Gray Surety ), a Treasury-listed surety carrier specializing in contract bonds for mid-sized and emerging contractors nationwide.

tamClaims.claim: The United States property and casualty market represented over $1 trillion in total written premiums during 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: We compete in the United States property and casualty market that represented over $1 trillion in total written premiums during 2024.
